description.english: You picked the wrong first elevator.
description.french: Tu as pris le mauvais premier ascenseur.
description.german: Du hast den ersten Aufzug falsch gewählt.
description.italian: Hai sbagliato il primo ascensore.
description.spanish: Te equivocaste con el primer ascensor.

description.english: Begin your climb within the Agency.
description.french: Commence ton ascension dans l'Agence.
description.german: Beginne den Aufstieg in der Agentur.
description.italian: Inizia la scalata dell'Agenzia.
description.spanish: Comienza el ascenso por la Agencia.

description.english: You met the Dealer.
description.french: Tu as fait la connaissance du Dealer.
description.german: Du hast den Dealer kennengelernt.
description.italian: Hai fatto la conoscenza del Dealer.
description.spanish: Has conocido al Dealer.

description.english: You obtained your first psychological profile.
description.french: Tu as obtenu ton premier profil psychologique.
description.german: Du hast dein erstes psychologisches Profil erhalten.
description.italian: Hai ottenuto il tuo primo profilo psicologico.
description.spanish: Has obtenido tu primer perfil psicológico.

description.english: From now on, you will handle recruitment.
description.french: À partir de maintenant, tu devras t'occuper des embauches.
description.german: Ab jetzt musst du dich um die Einstellungen kümmern.
description.italian: Da questo momento, dovrai occuparti delle assunzioni.
description.spanish: A partir de ahora, tendrás que encargarte de las contrataciones.

description.english: You can now play with the Agency's fate.
description.french: Tu peux maintenant jouer avec le destin de l'Agence.
description.german: Jetzt kannst du mit dem Schicksal der Agentur spielen.
description.italian: Ora puoi giocare con le sorti dell'Agenzia.
description.spanish: Ahora puedes jugar con el destino de la Agencia.

description.english: You can now decide who stays and who goes.
description.french: Tu peux maintenant décider qui reste et qui part.
description.german: Jetzt kannst du entscheiden, wer bleibt und wer geht.
description.italian: Ora puoi decidere chi resta e chi va.
description.spanish: Ahora puedes decidir quién se queda y quién se va.

description.english: You can now decide which advertising campaign deserves to survive.
description.french: Tu peux maintenant décider quelle campagne publicitaire mérite de survivre.
description.german: Jetzt kannst du entscheiden, welche Werbekampagne überleben darf.
description.italian: Ora puoi decidere quale campagna pubblicitaria merita di sopravvivere.
description.spanish: Ahora puedes decidir qué campaña publicitaria merece sobrevivir.

description.english: You can now answer some unusual questions.
description.french: Tu peux maintenant répondre à quelques questions particulières.
description.german: Jetzt kannst du einige besondere Fragen beantworten.
description.italian: Ora potrai rispondere a qualche domanda particolare.
description.spanish: Ahora podrás responder a algunas preguntas particulares.

description.english: You probably still don't understand the rules of the game.
description.french: Tu n'as probablement pas encore compris les règles du jeu.
description.german: Wahrscheinlich hast du die Spielregeln noch nicht verstanden.
description.italian: Probabilmente non hai ancora capito le regole del gioco.
description.spanish: Probablemente aún no has entendido las reglas del juego.

description.english: You completed your first run.
description.french: Tu as terminé ta première run.
description.german: Du hast deine erste Run abgeschlossen.
description.italian: Hai completato la tua prima run.
description.spanish: Has completado tu primera run.

description.english: You did not find all of Lisa's cards.
description.french: Tu n'as pas trouvé toutes les cartes de Lisa.
description.german: Du hast nicht alle Karten von Lisa gefunden.
description.italian: Non hai trovato tutte le carte di Lisa.
description.spanish: No encontraste todas las cartas de Lisa.

description.english: You found all of Lisa's cards.
description.french: Tu as trouvé toutes les cartes de Lisa.
description.german: Du hast alle Karten von Lisa gefunden.
description.italian: Hai trovato tutte le carte di Lisa.
description.spanish: Encontraste todas las cartas de Lisa.

description.english: You cleared Lisa's debt.
description.french: Tu as effacé la dette de Lisa.
description.german: Du hast Lisas Schulden beglichen.
description.italian: Hai risanato il debito di Lisa.
description.spanish: Has saldado la deuda de Lisa.

description.english: You still haven't cleared Lisa's debt.
description.french: Tu n'as pas encore effacé la dette de Lisa.
description.german: Du hast Lisas Schulden noch nicht beglichen.
description.italian: Non hai ancora risanato il debito di Lisa.
description.spanish: Aún no has saldado la deuda de Lisa.

description.english: You can now decide the advertising slogans.
description.french: Tu peux maintenant décider des slogans publicitaires.
description.german: Jetzt kannst du über Werbeslogans entscheiden.
description.italian: Ora puoi decidere i claim pubblicitari.
description.spanish: Ahora puedes decidir los eslóganes publicitarios.

description.english: You can now go on crazy shopping sprees.
description.french: Tu peux maintenant faire des achats démesurés.
description.german: Jetzt kannst du hemmungslos einkaufen.
description.italian: Ora puoi fare spese folli.
description.spanish: Ahora puedes hacer compras alocadas.

description.english: You can now take care of your virtual pet.
description.french: Tu peux maintenant t'occuper de ton animal virtuel.
description.german: Jetzt kannst du dich um dein virtuelles Haustier kümmern.
description.italian: Ora potrai prenderti cura del tuo virtual pet.
description.spanish: Ahora podrás cuidar de tu mascota virtual.

description.english: You can now communicate with the other employees.
description.french: Tu peux maintenant communiquer avec les autres employés.
description.german: Jetzt kannst du mit den anderen Angestellten kommunizieren.
description.italian: Ora puoi comunicare con gli altri impiegati.
description.spanish: Ahora puedes comunicarte con los demás empleados.

description.english: You found all of Lisa's cards.
description.french: Tu as trouvé toutes les cartes de Lisa.
description.german: Du hast alle Karten von Lisa gefunden.
description.italian: Hai trovato tutte le carte di Lisa.
description.spanish: Encontraste todas las cartas de Lisa.

description.english: You found all of Arthur's cards.
description.french: Tu as trouvé toutes les cartes d'Arthur.
description.german: Du hast alle Karten von Arthur gefunden.
description.italian: Hai trovato tutte le carte di Arthur.
description.spanish: Encontraste todas las cartas de Arthur.

description.english: You found all of Paul's cards.
description.french: Tu as trouvé toutes les cartes de Paul.
description.german: Du hast alle Karten von Paul gefunden.
description.italian: Hai trovato tutte le carte di Paul.
description.spanish: Encontraste todas las cartas de Paul.

description.english: You found all of Betty's cards.
description.french: Tu as trouvé toutes les cartes de Betty.
description.german: Du hast alle Karten von Betty gefunden.
description.italian: Hai trovato tutte le carte di Betty.
description.spanish: Encontraste todas las cartas de Betty.
